description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a smooth, seamless body and a slightly domed top. The upper section features a pump-style dispenser with a small circular nozzle and a subtle button on the rear for actuation. The bottle is primarily a light gray color, with orange branding and product information printed on the front. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative graphics or patterns aside from the text. The bottle appears to be made of rigid plastic, likely with an internal air gap and liquid contents. Its size and ergonomic shape suggest it is intended for easy handling and dispensing in personal care routines.
description: A sleek, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a pump dispenser and minimalist orange branding on a light gray body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pump nozzle, button, and orange branding text clearly on the smooth cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bottle's uniform cylindrical profile and the gentle curve of the cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the actuator button and the smooth, unadorned back of the bottle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the continuous cylindrical shape and cap curvature.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a gently rounded top
